# Hello there! Welcome 👋🏾

[![AltSchool Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Engineering-6773E5?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/png;base64,&logoColor=white&link=https://engineering.altschoolafrica.com/)](https://space-tourizm-project.netlify.app/) [![Website Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/-My_Website-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=Google-Chrome&logoColor=white&link=https://css-assignment-1-6-links.netlify.app/)](https://css-assignment-1-6-links.netlify.app/) [![Linkedin Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/-@Linkedin-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=Linkedin&logoColor=white&link=https://www.linkedin.com/in/ojasperduruzor)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ojasperduruzor) [![Twitter Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/-@Twitter-1ca0f1?style=for-the-badge&logo=twitter&logoColor=white&link=https://twitter.com/kachijasper)](https://twitter.com/kachijasper)

I’m a Frontend and Backend Engineer with hands-on experience building scalable applications using Node.js and Express.js. I work with MVC and monolithic architectures to design and structure efficient, maintainable systems, and I use MongoDB for robust data management. I’m passionate about developing high-performance web applications and deploying them seamlessly using platforms like Vercel.

Currently, I’m focused on web engineering, SaaS platforms, and cloud-native development—continuously improving my skills, contributing to open-source projects, and sharing knowledge as I grow within the tech community.

**Here's a quick summary about me**:

- 😊 Pronouns: She/Her
- 💡 Fun fact: I completed my frontend training at AltSchool Africa (School of Software Engineering, Class of 2024) and my backend training at TS Academy, where I built a health management system as my capstone project, working as part of a team
- 🌱 Currently: I’m currently an intern at Truemind Innovations, where I’m working on an online food e-commerce portal and a Learning Management System (LMS) for my capstone project
- 🤝 Open to collaborating on open-source projects, hackathons, and internship opportunities
- 💼 Job interests: Software Engineer, Frontend Engineer
- 📫 View [view my resume](https://acrobat.adobe.com/id/urn:aaid:sc:EU:4d01e237-82bf-4dea-a8ea-39de829dc91b)
- 📧 Email: ojasperduruzor@gmail.com
